briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC public key to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC expected signature to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC private key to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC ephemeral key to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC Data hash to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC Data length to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function performs ECC sign verify known answer test(KAT)

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance
Type of ECC curve class either prime/binary curve and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: It is a callback API for Signature Verification Request.

parameterdescription.para: Unique ID for the submitted request
Status of the request

briefdescription.para: This function performs ECC sign generate known answer test(KAT)

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance
Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: It is a callback API for Signature Generation Request.

parameterdescription.para: Unique ID for the submitted request
Status of the request

briefdescription.para: This function performs ECC pairwise consistency test on ECC Curves.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance
Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)
ECC public key
ECC private key

briefdescription.para: This function Generate key pairs for the ECC curves NIST-P192, P256, P384, and P521.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance
Type of ECC curve(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)
Pointer to the pulic-key buffer
Pointer to the private-key buffer

briefdescription.para: It is a completion callback API for Private-key generation Request.

parameterdescription.para: Unique ID for the submitted request
Status of the Request

briefdescription.para: It is a completion callback API for Public-key generation request.

parameterdescription.para: Unique ID for the submitted request
Status of the request
